_meta.canonical_target: Beelink Mini PC — 4-core Debian LXC (isolated benchmark instance)
notes: Tool: h2load (nghttp2-client 1.64.0, Debian). wrk on this host is not compiled with TLS; h2load used against https://127.0.0.1:8443.
p99_ms is null — h2load outputs a CDF table rather than a single p99 value; the run.sh parser does not extract it.
errors: 0 — confirmed with fixed parser (grep 'failed: N' instead of grep 'failed'). Prior v0.4.5 capture had errors=45000 due to the parser bug.
tag was 'unknown' at capture time (benchmarks/ extracted without .git); corrected to v0.4.5 post-run.
Tardigrade binary is identical to the v0.4.5 release; commits after the tag only changed benchmarks/run.sh and docs.
